harbor-heights-al.title: Harbor Heights Mystic - Mystic, CT apartments for rent
priceLines: Harbor Heights Mystic apartments start at $2,045/month. There are 15 available apartments priced from $2,045 to $3,478. Prices were last verified by Harbor Heights Mystic 1 hour ago.

We are a pet friendly community! Per pet, there is a $275 nonrefundable for cats and $375 nonrefundable pet fee for dogs. Monthly pet rent is $40 per cat and $55 per dog. Please contact the office for breed and weight restrictions.

Surface lot, unassigned. One surface space per licensed resident. Garages are available for an additional monthly fee. There will also be garages available with capabilities to charge electric vehicles. Call for more information. Garages: $150 per month Tesla Charging: $175 per month.
